scenarios.description: generate(f) throws IllegalArgumentException when f is less than -5e9 (lower bound violation)
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IllegalArgumentException with message "Value must be between -5000000000.0 and 5000000000.0, inclusive"; no return
pseudocode: throws IllegalArgumentException("Value must be between -5000000000.0 and 5000000000.0, inclusive");

scenarios.description: generate(f) throws IllegalArgumentException when f is greater than 5e9 (upper bound violation)
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IllegalArgumentException with message "Value must be between -5000000000.0 and 5000000000.0, inclusive"; no return
pseudocode: throws IllegalArgumentException("Value must be between -5000000000.0 and 5000000000.0, inclusive");

scenarios.description: generate(f) returns all-zero hex string when f is exactly -5e9 (lower boundary inclusive)
generate(f) returns correct hex string when f is exactly 5e9 (upper boundary inclusive)
